trades.reasoning: AMZN is down -14.3% from avg cost of $274.11 (current $234.80), far past the -7% stop-loss threshold, and screener confirms weak momentum (RSI 31.4, below SMA-20) — exit to recover capital.
Score 100 with all five signals aligned: RSI 63.9 in bullish zone, MACD crossover + rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and volume surge — affordable entry with strong momentum setup.
Score 100 with full signal stack and volume surge; crypto mining exposure adds volatility but the technical setup is clean and matches our momentum strategy.

decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back mildly today (NASDAQ -0.6%, S&P500 -0.2%), which is a normal neutral session — not a reason to go defensive. AMZN is a forced sell: it's sitting at a -14.3% loss, well past the -7% stop-loss, and technical signals confirm continued weakness. Freeing that capital lets us fill three slots with high-conviction score-100 setups (NOK, CIFR, FA) that all show volume surges and clean MACD crossovers.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted lower on Friday, with the NASDAQ falling 0.6% and the S&P 500 slipping 0.2% in what analysts described as routine profit-taking after several strong sessions. Technology stocks led the modest decline as investors rotated briefly into defensive names ahead of the weekend. With no major macro catalysts, the market held its broader uptrend intact and the pullback is considered a healthy consolidation rather than a directional reversal.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週五小幅回落，那斯達克指數下跌0.6%，標普500指數微跌0.2%，市場人士普遍認為此為前幾個交易日強勢上漲後的正常獲利了結。科技股引領本次跌勢，部分資金短暫轉入防禦性板塊。由於缺乏重大宏觀催化劑，整體上升趨勢維持不變，本次回調被視為健康整固，而非趨勢逆轉。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a pre-set rule that automatically triggers a sale when a stock falls a certain percentage below your purchase price — in our case, -7%. It exists to prevent a small loss from becoming a catastrophic one. AMZN today is a perfect example: the position drifted to -14.3% without a timely exit, meaning the stop-loss rule should have fired much earlier to protect capital.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 停損是一種預設規則，當股票從買入價格下跌到特定百分比時（本組合設定為-7%），便自動觸發賣出指令。其目的是防止小虧損演變成難以挽回的重大損失。今日的亞馬遜倉位正是典型案例：持倉虧損已擴大至-14.3%，遠超停損線，說明應在早期即按規則出場以保護本金。
